nodes.name: extract_patches_2d
nodes.description: Extract 2D image patches with optional subsampling.

nodes.name: image_patch_sampling_and_assembly
nodes.description: Extract sliding 2D patches from an image and optionally subsample them.

inputs.name: image
inputs.constraints: 2-D or 3-D image array with spatial dimensions at least patch_size

inputs.name: max_patches
inputs.constraints: optional positive integer count or fraction in (0, 1]

inputs.name: random_state
inputs.constraints: optional deterministic random seed or RNG handle

outputs.name: patches
outputs.constraints: stack of extracted patches with trailing shape patch_size

nodes.type_signature: (image: array, patch_size: tuple, max_patches: scalar, random_state: scalar) -> array
nodes.conceptual_summary: Extract local image neighborhoods as a patch tensor.

nodes.name: reconstruct_from_patches_2d
nodes.description: Reconstruct an image by averaging overlapping 2D patches.

nodes.name: patches_to_image_reconstruction
nodes.description: Reconstruct a 2D image tensor from overlapping patches.

inputs.name: image_size
inputs.constraints: two integers defining the reconstructed image size

nodes.conceptual_summary: Reassemble a 2D image from a patch tensor.

nodes.name: img_to_graph
nodes.description: Convert a 3D image into a sparse voxel adjacency graph.

nodes.name: 3d_image_graph_materialization
nodes.description: Build a sparse voxel-neighborhood graph from an image volume.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.constraints: optional boolean mask broadcastable to img

inputs.name: dtype
inputs.constraints: optional numeric dtype for edge weights

outputs.name: graph
outputs.constraints: sparse adjacency representation over active voxels

nodes.type_signature: (img: array, mask: array, return_as: scalar, dtype: scalar) -> array
nodes.conceptual_summary: Construct a sparse graph from voxel neighbors and image values.

nodes.name: grid_to_graph
nodes.description: Construct a sparse adjacency graph over a rectangular voxel grid.

nodes.name: voxel_grid_graph_assembly
nodes.description: Build a sparse adjacency graph for a rectangular grid with optional masking.

inputs.name: n_x
inputs.constraints: positive grid size along the x axis

inputs.name: n_y
inputs.constraints: positive grid size along the y axis

inputs.name: n_z
inputs.constraints: positive grid size along the z axis

inputs.name: mask
inputs.constraints: optional boolean mask over the grid

inputs.name: dtype
inputs.constraints: optional numeric dtype for edge values

outputs.name: graph
outputs.constraints: sparse adjacency representation over grid nodes

nodes.type_signature: (n_x: int, n_y: int, n_z: int, mask: array, return_as: scalar, dtype: scalar) -> array
nodes.conceptual_summary: Construct a sparse voxel-grid graph from grid dimensions.
